[SIMULATION MODE] I am currently operating without a live Gemini connection, but I've reviewed the warehouse state: CURRENT WAREHOUSE STATE:. How can I assist with your supply chain optimization today?
Analyze invoice #402 and ssummarize any discrepancies.

Invoice #402 from AeroMaterials shows a line-item discrepancy on Resin Mix B — the scanned price field contains an OCR error ('$120.S0' instead of '$120.50'). The corrected total should be $4,560.00. I recommend reviewing and syncing from the Manual Review Queue.
What does our Q3 stock forecast look like for Lithium-Ion Batteries?

Based on current demand forecasting data, Lithium-Ion Batteries are trending +34% over the next 90 days. With only 154 units currently in stock against a suggested threshold of 500, I recommend approving the restock pipeline immediately to avoid a supply gap ahead of the seasonal surge.
Optimize fleet routing for the delayed shipment TRK-992-A.

Shipment TRK-992-A (Aluminum Sheets, Shanghai → LA) is currently overdue by 2 days. The sea freight leg has been cleared through customs. I recommend escalating to the carrier immediately and exploring an express rail redirect from the Port of LA to reduce further delay. ETA could be recovered by 1 day.
